description: Register a LanceDB IO manager for ML-optimised columnar storage ideal for embeddings and vector data

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

base_path.label: Base Path
base_path.description: Directory (or S3/GCS URI) where LanceDB tables are stored, e.g. '/data/lance' or 's3://my-bucket/lance'

table_name_prefix.label: Table Name Prefix
table_name_prefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to every table name, e.g. 'prod_'

s3_access_key_env_var.label: S3 Access Key Env Var
s3_access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS access key when using S3-based storage

s3_secret_key_env_var.label: S3 Secret Key Env Var
s3_secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS secret key when using S3-based storage

s3_endpoint_url.label: S3 Endpoint URL
s3_endpoint_url.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL, e.g. 'http://localhost:9000' for MinIO

name: Lance IO Manager
